original_text: Key risks warrant caution despite the strong fundamental backdrop. NVIDIA faces mounting congressional scrutiny regarding technical assistance provided to Chinese AI startup DeepSeek, with Reuters reporting that a letter from Representative John Moolenaar revealed collaboration that enabled efficiency gains for models later utilized by the Chinese military [4f614cf7-7e8b-4918-9137-cce8663f2afd]. This regulatory overhang introduces uncertainty around future export controls and geopolitical constraints. Additionally, revenue growth sustainability represents a consideration given the exceptional recent performance trajectory, with growth rates fluctuating from 6.08% in Q2 to 21.96% in Q3 and 19.51% in Q4 [0e671c19-4b44-47a7-9234-5d3634f7be27]. The company's concentrated business model focused on graphics, compute, and networking solutions creates operational risk exposure.

changes_summary: Fixed citation mismatch for revenue growth rates by moving calc_id 0e671c19-4b44-47a7-9234-5d3634f7be27 from chunk_ids to calc_ids list (it contains calculated YoY growth percentages, not raw chunk data). Added chunk_id cd7d7972-79b5-433f-b378-e23ffc087d85 to support the business model claim about graphics, compute, and networking solutions. Maintained original DeepSeek scrutiny citation (4f614cf7-7e8b-4918-9137-cce8663f2afd). All numerical values now properly sourced from cited calc_id.
